name: TOP_FUNCTIONS_BY_ASSIGNEE
description: Top functional/technology classes for one assignee by patent count.
cypher: MATCH (a:Assignee)<-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]-(p:Patent)-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]->(:TargetPair)-[:HAS_TARGET]->(:Target)-[:FUNCTIONED_AS]->(f:Functional_of_Target) WHERE toLower(a.name) = toLower($assignee) RETURN a.name AS assignee, f.name AS function, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count ORDER BY patent_count DESC, function LIMIT 10;
